generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations reported by the AGREE validator.
When fixing type mismatches, ensure helper declaration types align with expression types (int, real, bool).
Use only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers in AGREE expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `const name : type = value;` for constant definitions.
Use `eq name : type = expression;` for helper definitions.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce unqualified identifiers or types not present in the AADL model.
Do not attempt architectural changes to resolve AGREE validation errors; focus on contract corrections.
irrelevant_topics: AADL scope rules for component types and implementations
